Enabled.description: A Boolean value; set to true to activate the subscription, set to false to create the subscription but not active it.
Enabled.markdownDescription:
A Boolean value; set to true to activate the subscription, set to false to create the subscription but not active it.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

SnsTopicArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SNS topic created for event notification. Amazon SNS creates the ARN when you create a topic and subscribe to it.
SnsTopicArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the SNS topic created for event notification. Amazon SNS creates the ARN when you create a topic and subscribe to it.

Required: Yes
